title: A guide to new and used car loans | Wells Fargo

sections.name: Hero Marquee
sections.background: full-width image of truck at dealership with dark text overlay
sections.style: dark text on image background, centered text overlay
sections.overview: Full-width marquee image with heading and subtext about asking dealer for Wells Fargo auto loans

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image showing truck at a dealership, with centered heading 'Ask your dealer about Wells Fargo auto loans' and subtext 'Our nationwide network of nearly 11,000 dealerships is ready to help.'

sections.name: Auto loans: what to know (Tabs)
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, tabbed content below with icons
sections.overview: Section heading and introductory paragraph followed by a tabbed interface showing auto loan variables

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Auto loans: what to know' with decorative line above, followed by paragraph 'Financing a car can be overwhelming. Understanding the common variables of auto loans makes the process easier.'

Tabbed content interface with 4 tabs (Interest rate, Term length, Total amount financed, Monthly payment amount), each with a distinctive icon. Each tab reveals a short explanatory paragraph about that auto loan variable.

sections.name: Credit Close-Up Promo
sections.style: light, centered section title, then large promo with image on left and text on right
sections.overview: Section heading followed by a large promotional block for Credit Close-Up credit score tracking

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Increase your likelihood of credit approval' with decorative line above

Large promotional block with credit score gauge image (showing 808) on the left side, and on the right: heading 'Track your credit score with Credit Close-Up', descriptive paragraph, bullet list of 3 benefits (understand score changes, make improvement plan, set alerts), simulated screen disclaimer, and a 'Let's go' CTA button

sections.name: Before you buy
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, 3-column card grid below
sections.overview: Section heading followed by 3 cards with images and descriptions for car buying preparation

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Before you buy' with decorative line above
Grid of 3 cards, each with a large top image (car photos), bold title (Plan, Research, Budget), and descriptive paragraph text. Research card includes links to Kelley Blue Book and Edmunds.

sections.name: How to evaluate new and used vehicles (Tabs)
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, tabbed content below with icons
sections.overview: Section heading followed by a tabbed interface showing evaluation steps

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'How to evaluate new and used vehicles' with decorative line above

Tabbed content interface with 4 tabs (Find a vehicle you love, Inspect and test drive, Explore incentives, Ask about warranties), each with a distinctive icon. Each tab reveals a paragraph with advice for that evaluation step.

sections.name: Answers to auto financing questions (FAQ)
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, expandable FAQ items, centered CTA button at bottom
sections.overview: FAQ accordion section with 4 expandable questions and a link to review all FAQs

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Answers to auto financing questions' with decorative line above

Four expandable question-and-answer pairs (accordion style): 'How much experience does Wells Fargo have with auto financing?', 'How do I apply for a Wells Fargo auto loan?', 'What are aftermarket products?', 'What is Guaranteed Asset Protection (GAP)?'
Centered secondary button labeled 'Review all FAQs' linking to /help/loans/auto-loans-faqs/

sections.name: Additional resources
sections.background: white with cards having gold/yellow gradient backgrounds
sections.style: light, centered section title with decorative line, icon-based cards below in a 3-column grid
sections.overview: Section heading followed by grid of 3 resource cards with icons on gradient backgrounds

sequences.description: Centered section heading 'Additional resources' with decorative line above

Grid of 3 items, each with a small icon (64x64) on gold gradient background, heading, description text, and a CTA link. Items: 'Explore payment options' (cash icon, 'Let's go' link to /auto-loans/make-payments/), 'LifeSync' (goal-setting icon, 'Get started' link to sites.wf.com/lifesync/), 'Call us' (phone icon, number 1-800-289-8004 with business hours Mon-Sat)

sections.name: Footnotes and Disclaimers
sections.overview: Legal footnotes, FICO trademark notice, and document codes

sequences.description: Numbered footnotes: 1) Sign-up/mobile carrier disclaimer, 2) FICO Score eligibility/disclaimer for Wells Fargo account holders, 3) Terms for Online Access Agreement. Followed by Online Statements info, FICO trademark notice, and document codes QSR-12022026-8027176.1.1 and LRC-0925

excludedElements: External site modals (Carfax, KBB, Edmunds leaving notices)

localBlocks.name: hero
localBlocks.purpose: Large heading, text, buttons, optional background image for page intro

localBlocks.name: cards
localBlocks.purpose: Grid of items with images/icons and text

localBlocks.name: accordion-faq
localBlocks.purpose: Expandable question and answer sections (FAQ format)
